name: Strawberry-Cream Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle sliced strawberries with sugar; set aside.
2. Beat the sweetened condensed milk with lemon juice until thick.
3. Fold in the strawberries and whipped cream.
4. Divide the mixture among the crepes, folding each one.
5. Garnish with additional whipped cream and a strawberry centered on top.
6. Yields 6 servings.
